Table	Create Table
workshops	CREATE TABLE `workshops` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `slug` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `shortDescription` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `instructorName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `instructor` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `instructorTitle` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `instructorImage` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `workshopDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `duration` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `location` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `maxCapacity` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `ticketsSold` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ticketPrice` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `imageUrl` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `highlights` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `whatYouLearn` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `includes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','published','cancelled','completed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `startTime` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `endTime` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `totalCapacity` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `bookedCount` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `earlyBirdPrice` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `earlyBirdDeadline` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `price` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `slug` (`slug`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
